title: pilosella brachycoma
intro: Pilosella brachycoma, also known as Oxeye Daisy, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pilosella brachycoma include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as ulcers and irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of Pilosella brachycoma typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
